ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configuration_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* The name of the configuration parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the parameter's purpose and functionality */,
  "datatype" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value assigned to the parameter */,
  "mutability" TEXT /* Mutability status indicating if the parameter can be changed at runtime */,
  "param_category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter for better organization */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicate if the parameter is mandatory */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for numeric parameters */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for numeric parameters */,
  "validation_regex" TEXT /* Regular expression for validating parameter values */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Link to the storage backend if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_parameters_backend_id FOREIGN KEY ("backend_id") REFERENCES storage_backends ("backend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_backends" (
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage backend */,
  "backend_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage backend (e.g., HBase, Cassandra) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the backend's features and capabilities */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate if the backend is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the backend was added */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the backend was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_values" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated configuration parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value assigned to the parameter */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the default value (e.g., system, user) */,
  "is_overridable" INTEGER /* Indicate if the default value can be overridden */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Link to the storage backend if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_values_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_values_backend_id FOREIGN KEY ("backend_id") REFERENCES storage_backends ("backend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutability" (
  "mutability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutability type */,
  "mutability_type" TEXT /* Type of mutability (e.g., FIXED, MASKABLE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutability type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicate if this is the default mutability type */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Link to the storage backend if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration parameter that was changed */,
  "changed_value" TEXT /* Value that was changed to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Link to the storage backend if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_backend_id FOREIGN KEY ("backend_id") REFERENCES storage_backends ("backend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Storage, Compression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group's purpose */,
  "is_system_group" INTEGER /* Indicate if the group is a system-defined group */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Link to the storage backend if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_group_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration parameter */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter group */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicate if this is the primary group for the parameter */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Link to the storage backend if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_group_mappings_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_group_mappings_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES parameter_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_group_mappings_backend_id FOREIGN KEY ("backend_id") REFERENCES storage_backends ("backend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role associated with the permission */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Can the role edit configuration parameters? */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Can the role view configuration parameters? */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicate if this is the default permission for the role */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Link to the storage backend if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_accounts ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_backend_id FOREIGN KEY ("backend_id") REFERENCES storage_backends ("backend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the changed configuration parameter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the parameter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Link to the storage backend if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_changes_backend_id FOREIGN KEY ("backend_id") REFERENCES storage_backends ("backend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_changes_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("param_id")
)
